title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Setup Guide charge case outside screen zoom toggles when tapping circle button on third screen
steps: Open the Quick Setup Guide (QSG) in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the third screen showing the charge case outside view.
Tap the right circle button on the screen.
Observe the screen zoom in and display new text.
Tap the same right circle button again.
Observe the screen zoom out to the original charge case outside view.
expected: Tapping the right circle button toggles between a zoomed-in view with additional text and the original zoomed-out charge case outside view.
